questions.question: What is the main subject of this clip?
questions.rationale: Identifies the primary subject and action central to the clip

questions.question: What type of structure surrounds the horse and rider?
questions.rationale: Key environmental detail defining the setting and containment

questions.question: What buildings are visible in the background?
questions.answer_key: White or light-colored barns or stables
questions.rationale: Establishes the rural/farm setting context for the scene

questions.question: What is the rider wearing on their head?
questions.answer_key: A pink or magenta colored hat or helmet
questions.rationale: Distinctive visible detail that helps identify the main subject

questions.question: What is the color of the horse being ridden?
questions.rationale: Basic descriptive detail for visualizing the animal subject
